fix_plan: Change the outer container div in RoomIntroOverlay.tsx from 'fixed inset-0' to 'absolute inset-0' so the overlay is positioned relative to the canvas container (which is position:relative) instead of the browser viewport. This is the minimum one-word CSS class change that constrains the overlay to the 640x480 game canvas area.
diff_summary: Changed 'fixed' to 'absolute' in the outer container div className
notes: Root cause confirmed: 'fixed' positions relative to viewport, 'absolute' positions relative to nearest positioned ancestor (canvas container).

fix_plan: Change 'fixed inset-0' to 'absolute inset-0' on the three overlay divs in BreachDefensePage.tsx (START SCREEN at line 702, GAME OVER at line 801, VICTORY at line 862). The canvas container parent is already position:relative, so absolute positioning constrains these overlays to the 640x480 canvas area. NotificationToast is intentionally fixed and is not touched.
diff_summary: Changed 'fixed' to 'absolute' on three overlay container divs (start screen, game over, victory)
notes: Root cause confirmed: 'fixed' positions relative to viewport causing full-browser-width overlays. 'absolute' constrains them to the canvas container.

fix_plan: Update EducationalItemModal.tsx CSS classes to match the retro styling standard: change modal container to bg-white border-4 border-black with hard pixel shadow, add font-['Press_Start_2P'] to title/fact/button text elements, replace <Button> component with native <button> styled like CodexModal's retro button (pink bg, border-4, pixel shadow, active press effect), change inner card to bg-[#F0F0F0] border-black, and constrain max-width to 580px. Remove unused Button import.
diff_summary: Replaced system font/themed color classes with Press Start 2P pixel font, black borders, hard pixel shadows, and retro button styling matching existing CodexModal pattern
notes: Root cause confirmed: component predated retro styling standard. Matched patterns from CodexModal.tsx and PatientStoryReveal.tsx for consistency.

fix_plan: Add font-['Press_Start_2P'] to the outer container div so all text inherits the pixel font. Replace system-sized text classes (text-3xl, text-xl, text-lg, text-base, text-sm) with pixel-appropriate sizes (titles 14px, subtitles 12px, body 10px, fine print 8px). Change rounded-md to rounded-[4px]. Add shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] to the card and button. Add leading-relaxed to body text for readability with the pixel font. This is CSS-only changes in one file with zero net line delta.
diff_summary: Applied Press Start 2P pixel font, retro text sizes, hard pixel shadows, and tight border-radius to EndScreen component
notes: Root cause confirmed: component predated retro styling standard. All changes are className-only modifications matching patterns from PatientStoryReveal.tsx and CodexModal.tsx.

fix_plan: In handleDoorInteraction(), add a volume fade tween (0 over 300ms) on bgMusic before the camera fadeOut, so the music fades in sync with the visual transition. shutdown() already stops/clears bgMusic — no change needed there since the music is already silent by the time it runs. This is minimum: 3 lines added in one method, one file.
diff_summary: Added bgMusic volume fade tween (300ms) in handleDoorInteraction() before camera fadeOut
notes: Root cause confirmed: bgMusic.stop() in shutdown() was abrupt. Now music fades during the 300ms camera transition, matching visual timing. shutdown() cleanup still works since bgMusic reference persists until stop/undefined.

fix_plan: Add this.sound.play() calls in BreachDefenseScene.ts for tower_selected (onSelectTowerType), tower_fires (after projectile push), projectile_hit (on distance check hit), and wave_cleared (wave complete celebration). Add eventBridge.emit(REACT_PLAY_SFX) calls in UnifiedGamePage.tsx for modal_open (story/help modals), modal_close (story/intro/room-intro dismiss), item_collect (onInteractItem), and choice_select (ChoicePrompt onChoice). Add door transition sound in ExplorationScene.ts handleDoorInteraction(). Update onPlaySfx handler to pass rate parameter. All 10 missing sounds reuse existing loaded keys with volume/rate variations — no new audio files needed.
diff_summary: Added sound.play() calls at 10 missing action points using existing sfx keys with volume/rate variations
notes: Sound mapping: modal_open=sfx_interact@0.3/rate1.1, modal_close=sfx_interact@0.2/rate0.9, choice_select=sfx_interact@0.35/rate1.15, item_collect=sfx_interact@0.4/rate1.3, room transition=sfx_footstep@0.35/rate0.8, tower_selected=sfx_interact@0.2/rate1.2, tower_fires=sfx_tower_place@0.15/rate1.5, projectile_hit=sfx_enemy_death@0.12/rate1.4, wave_cleared=sfx_wave_start@0.5/rate1.2. ESC exit and room_cleared already had sounds.

fix_plan: In RoomProgressHUD.tsx, replace rounded-lg with rounded-[4px], border-2 border-[#FF6B9D] with border-4 border-black, and add shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] to the outer container div. CSS-only, one class attribute change.
diff_summary: Replaced rounded-lg with rounded-[4px], thin pink border with border-4 border-black, added hard pixel shadow
notes: Root cause: component predated POLISH_STANDARD Section 6 Rule 6.2 retro UI requirements.

fix_plan: In PatientStoryReveal.tsx, replace rounded-full on the icon wrapper div with rounded-[4px], and replace rounded-lg on the story text container with rounded-[4px]. Two class attribute changes, CSS-only.
diff_summary: Replaced rounded-full and rounded-lg with rounded-[4px] on icon wrapper and text container
notes: Root cause: rounded-full (50% radius) and rounded-lg (8px radius) both violate max 4px corner radius rule.

fix_plan: In BreachDefensePage.tsx, replace the start screen's linear-gradient background with flat bg-[#1a1a2e], removing backgroundSize and gradient-shift animation. One style object change.
diff_summary: Replaced linear-gradient background with flat #1a1a2e color, removed gradient-shift animation
notes: Root cause: start screen used animated gradient background violating POLISH_STANDARD Section 6 Rule 6.2 no-gradients rule. The gradient-shift keyframes remain in the style block but are now unused — harmless dead CSS.
